title: Tracy Cooper
compiled_truth: Tracy Cooper is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-22 to 2001-06-25), Tracy Cooper sent 14 and received 202 emails, totalling 216 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (14), [Marchris Robinson](people/marchris-robinson) (10), [Sue Nord](people/sue-nord) (8), [Susan Landwehr](people/susan-landwehr) (8), [Lara Leibman](people/lara-leibman) (7).
